name: Paella
recipeIngredient: 2 Pounds Frying Chicken, Cut Into 8 Pieces
Or Fish Stock Or Chicken Broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the chicken.
2. Make a paste of the salt, pepper, lemon juice, garlic, and 2 tablespoons of canola oil. Rub onto the chicken pieces.
3. Heat the remaining oil in a large deep skillet and brown the chicken.
4. Add the sausage, onions, and green pepper. Cook over low heat for ten minutes, stirring frequently.
5. Add the rice; cook five minutes.
6. Mix in the tomato sauce, water or stock, and saffron. Cover and cook over medium heat for 20 minutes.
7. Stir occasionally during cooking.
8. Add the peas, shrimp, and scallops; cover and cook an additional five minutes.
9. Garnish with pimentos.
